name: Golf Performance Academy
about: The Golf Performance Academy (GPA) is a comprehensive golf training and club fitting facility located at 4200 Lover Lane in Kalamazoo, Michigan. The venue specializes in high-level instruction, custom club fitting, and golf technology services. GPA offers a wide range of programs including private instruction, junior golf, clinics, and the Titleist Performance Institute (TPI) Golf Fitness Program. The facility is equipped with advanced technology such as Foresight GC2/HMT and Flightscope Launch Monitors for swing and club analysis, catering to golfers of all skill levels from beginners to professionals. The academy's philosophy focuses on individualized swing analysis rather than a one-size-fits-all system, aiming to simplify the complex motion of golf for each student. Located adjacent to Milham Park Golf Club's practice tee, GPA also features a large putting green and one of the area's finest short game practice areas.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive club fitting using the industry's best launch monitors
Individualized swing analysis and instruction tailored to each golfer
State-of-the-art technology including dual video cameras and swing analysis software
Adjacent to a golf course with premier short game practice area
Titleist Performance Institute (TPI) Golf Fitness Program offerings

simulator_hardware.notes: Additional launch monitor for fitting and instruction

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GPA offers club rentals and has a golf shop with starter and intermediate clubs available for purchase. For fitting sessions, you can bring your own clubs or use the facility's demo equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned on the website. It's advisable to contact the facility directly for specific policies on outside food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify exact timing for 18-hole simulations. Golf simulation times typically vary based on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GPA offers specific junior golf programs and welcomes golfers of all ages, including beginners and juniors.
